productDisplayName: Salomon Men Black RX Prime Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe salomon RX Prime is a lightweight shoe designed to offer a cushioned ride, especially after a heavy duty triathlon or rock scrambling. The padded inner is designed to soothe the sole of your feet - what's more it features a 'Reelax' platform with OS muscle and OS tendon structure. Bottom line is that this is the best recovery shoe in the market, designed with the specific purpose of protecting your internal foot structure. It's a great 'before' shoe, wear it before that marathon you've trained for and after! Delighted customers say that this shoe is great even for a quick shopping run or a work out session at the gym - so light it's like walking barefoot ( but with plush padding!) Comes with a shoe hanger.Product DetailsNylon mesh upper in black with thermoplastic urethane overlays for an ultra light sensationQuicklace system - pull on toggle straps for a great Fit to ensure your feet don't slip outLeather footbed to conform to your foot size and an all-day-massage feelNon marking outsole called ContaGrip for a good holdMaterial and CareMesh, leatherRemove dirt with a soft wet brush and clean waterDo not machine wash or dry under the sunDry in room temperatureFor specific care instructions on each part of this shoe, refer booklet that comes with this shoe
